title: アオハル杯1戦目にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After much anticipation, the first round of the
Unity Cup preseason has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm a li'l bit nervous, but there's no need to worry,
y'all!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Our goal is to take down Team Zenith with a
bang! So we can't go messin' up at the first
hurdle, got it?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Let's work together and have a race full o' smiles!
